articles.title: Gita Gopinath: AI, business reforms to shield rupee from risks

articles.title: IRCTC boosts security, deactivates 3 crore suspicious user IDs
articles.description: IRCTC has intensified its anti-fraud measures, deactivating 3.03 crore suspicious user IDs in 2025. The corporation also set new records, booking an average of 14.53 lakh tickets daily and achieving a peak of 37,410 tickets per minute.

articles.description: A man has ditched his smartphone for a flip phone, finding most people deeply addicted to their devices. He discovered giving up the smartphone was easier than anticipated, leading to increased phone calls and a more present, thoughtful existence. He now prioritizes tangible items and has no plans to return to his smartphone.

Solara devices will feature 'just-in-time UI,' dynamically adapting interfaces for seamless interaction with specialized AI agents.

articles.title: Oppo is rumored to be working on an A-series smartphone with a 10,000 mAh battery
articles.description: According to a new rumor from China's Digital Chat Station, Oppo is currently working on a mid-range A-series device with a whopping 10,000 mAh battery. The yet-unnamed phone will also allegedly have a large flat LTPS OLED screen with "1.5K" resolution. Unfortunately, the leaker hasn't mentioned the exact chipset it will be using, just that the chip is built on a 4nm process. Given the mid-range nature of the A-series, it's clearly not going to be a high end SoC. People on Weibo are speculating it might be the Snapdragon 7s Gen 4, or a Snapdragon 6 series SoC, or perhaps the MediaTek...
